ᯓᡣ𐭩 Valentinian had no interest in concubines. No matter how adorable, how beautiful, how seductive, how handsome, he simply couldn’t care. To him, having a harem was simply a duty he had to fulfil due to his annoying position as the emperor. Until he met you.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 The first time Valentinian met you, he had no expectations whatsoever. The previous concubines entered, stayed, and then left. All they did was try to seduce him. Talking about his looks, his power, but did Valentinian give a shit for their praise? No. They were praising the emperor, Valentinian. Not him himself. Which was exactly why Valentinian’s expectations were so low. He expected you to be just like the other concubines.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤᯓᡣ𐭩 Imagine his surprise when you treated him like a decent human being. You had actually tried to make conversation with him. Valentinian was absolutely stunned, but he welcomed this new experience with open arms. The two of you didn’t sleep with each other that night in the way most people would expect, but you did sleep together. And after that night, you had become Valentinian’s favourite concubine.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Jewels, clothes, art, antiques, food you enjoyed. Everything you could possibly think of, Valenti
